items.title: Source: Dissolution of Iraq's Joint Operations Command
items.desc: Shafaq News- Baghdad Iraq has abolished the Joint Operations Command (JOC) and folded its functions into the Office of the Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces, a security source told Shafaq News on Wednesday. items.title: Air defenses intercept suspected drones over Erbil

items.title: IRGC keeps Hormuz closed, threatens oil exports
